questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Entrepreneurship is the ability to convert an idea into a successful business venture.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It involves creativity, risk-taking, innovation, and effective management.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): A business angel is an individual who invests their personal funds in a start-up business in exchange for equity.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Crowdfunding is a financing option where a large number of people contribute small amounts of money to support a business idea.
